hero.headline: Storm Damage? We're On Your Roof *Within 24 Hours*
hero.subheadline: Charlotte's fastest response team for emergency roof repairs. Free inspections, insurance claim assistance, and same-day temporary protection for your home.

services_section.label: OUR EXPERTISE
services_section.heading: Complete Roofing Solutions for Charlotte Homes
services_section.subheading: From storm damage to scheduled replacements, we handle every aspect of your roofing needs

services.title: Emergency Storm Damage Repair
services.description: Fast response to wind, hail, and fallen tree damage. Temporary protection within hours, permanent repairs scheduled immediately with full insurance documentation.

services.title: Complete Roof Replacement
services.description: Full tear-off and installation using premium materials. GAF Master Elite certified with extended warranties on workmanship and materials.

services.title: Insurance Claim Support
services.description: We handle the paperwork, meet with adjusters, and ensure you get maximum coverage. No upfront costs when insurance approves your claim.

services.title: Seamless Gutter Systems
services.description: Custom-fit gutters and downspouts to protect your foundation. Leaf guards available to reduce maintenance and prevent clogging issues.

about.heading: Serving Charlotte Families Through Every Storm
about.body: For over 15 years, we've been Charlotte's go-to roofing contractor when storms hit. Our team lives in the community we serve, responding faster than national chains because your neighbors are our neighbors. We've restored hundreds of roofs across Mecklenburg County, working directly with every major insurance carrier to make the process seamless for homeowners.

reviews_section.label: REAL CUSTOMERS
reviews_section.heading: What Charlotte Homeowners Say About Us

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: After the April hailstorm, they were on my roof the same day I called. Had temporary tarps up within 2 hours and walked me through the entire insurance process. New roof looks incredible.

reviews.name: Mike R.
reviews.text: Tree fell on our roof during that big storm in March. Charlotte Roofing had it completely repaired in 3 days and dealt with State Farm directly. Saved us thousands in hassle.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: Replaced our 20-year-old roof last fall. They finished in 2 days, cleaned up perfectly, and the price beat two other local companies. Very professional crew.

service_areas.label: SERVICE COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Roofing Services Across Charlotte Metro
service_areas.subheading: Fast emergency response and scheduled services throughout Mecklenburg County

cta.heading: Don't Wait - Storm Damage Gets Worse Fast
cta.body: Every day you delay roof repairs costs more money and risks interior damage. Get your free inspection scheduled now.
